user_prompt: Control Fidelity Protocol Stage-Gate Pipeline: A horizontal left-to-right flow diagram showing 6 gates (G1 through G6) as diamond checkpoints connected by arrows. Between the gates, show the assurance artifacts produced/consumed: Before G1: Human Intent (natural language). G1 (Intent Contract Approval) produces IC (Intent Contract). G2 (Scope & Invariant Verification) consumes IC, produces OE (Orchestration Envelope). G3 (Execution Authorization) resolves execution mode (Socratic/Restricted/Standard). G4 (Execution Completion) produces EE (Execution Envelope) with PRE+POST. G5 (Theory Verification) produces RP (Reconstruction Proof) with Design Rationale + Prediction Probes. G6 (Merge Authorization) gates production merge. Color code gates: green if passed, red if failed (error state). Show artifacts as document icons between gates. Label the three planes above: Directive Plane spans G1-G2, Execution Plane spans G3-G4, Reconstruction Plane spans G5-G6. Add CN (Composition Narrative) and CP (Composition Proof) as optional multi-agent artifacts near G4-G5. Clean professional style, navy and steel blue color scheme.

iterations.critique:
SCORE: 8.5

STRENGTHS:
- Excellent visual hierarchy and clear horizontal flow that strictly follows the requested stage-gate logic.
- Professional navy and steel blue color palette that conveys high-tech assurance and engineering rigor.
- Strong symbolic representation of the three Planes (Directive, Execution, Reconstruction) using overhead brackets that clearly delineate the phases.
- High readability with crisp typography and intuitive icon usage for the artifacts and status indicators.

ISSUES:
- Text Duplication: In several places, labels are redundant (e.g., "INTENT CONTRACT CONTRACT APPROVAL" under G1 and duplicate "EE" and "RP" labels).
- Alignment/Cramping: The G3 execution mode branch (Socratic/Restricted/Standard) is a bit tight, causing the "G4" diamond to feel crowded by the converging arrows.
- Minor Visual Artifact: There is a small stray line/circle near the EE artifact (intended to link to the multi-agent artifacts) that looks slightly unpolished.

SPECIFIC_IMPROVEMENTS:
- Remove the redundant word "CONTRACT" from the G1 label and consolidate the artifact labels so the acronym and full name only appear once to reduce visual clutter.
- Adjust the vertical spacing of the Execution Plane (G3-G4) to give the three execution mode paths more breathing room.
- Ensure the "Passed/Failed" indicators are perfectly aligned horizontally across the entire footer of the diagram for better symmetry.

VERDICT: ACCEPTABLE
